title: Account Settings
description: Manage your profile information, privacy controls and account security.

general.avatar_hint: Click the image to change your profile photo. You can use JPG, PNG, or GIF formats.
general.about_hint: A short description to be displayed on your profile.

preferences.title: Privacy and notifications
preferences.description: Choose who can see your profile, how follow requests behave and how we notify you.
preferences.profile_visibility_hint: Controls who can open and browse your profile.
preferences.follow_policy_hint: Decide whether new followers are accepted automatically.
preferences.activity_visibility_hint: Controls how widely your activity stream is shown.
preferences.notifications_description: These toggles prepare your account for email and push notification delivery.
preferences.email_notifications_hint: Receive updates in your email inbox.
preferences.push_notifications_hint: Receive alerts directly inside the app experience.

security.title: Change Password
security.description: We recommend using a strong password for your account security.
security.hint: You will need to log in again after changing your password.

moderation.title: Blocked and muted users
moderation.description: Manage the people you have blocked or muted without needing to revisit their profiles.

blocked.title: Blocked users
blocked.description: Blocked users cannot view your content or interact with you.
blocked.empty: You have not blocked anyone yet.

muted.title: Muted users
muted.description: Muted users stay in the system, but their activity is hidden from your feed and notifications.
muted.empty: You have not muted anyone yet.

toasts.avatar_error: An error occurred while uploading the image.
toasts.password_updated: Password successfully changed! Please log in again.
toasts.password_error: Password could not be changed. Please check your information.
toasts.moderation_error: Moderation settings could not be updated.
